title: Cell Identity
description: Identity record for a single broodforge cell. Stored in twin/federation/cells/{cell_id}.json. Used as the primary federation registry entry for this cell.

cell_id.description: Globally unique cell identifier (e.g. proxmox-cell-a, home-pve01-cell).

registered_at.description: UTC timestamp when this cell was first registered.

last_updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the most recent twin state update.

headscale_url.description: Headscale server URL for this cell (WAN profile only).

forgejo_url.description: Forgejo instance URL for this cell's GitOps repository.

assessment_engine_url.description: Assessment Engine API URL for this cell.

node_count.description: Total Proxmox node count in this cell.

capabilities.description: Declared capabilities of this cell (used for federation capability matching).

federation_trust.description: Which cells this cell trusts and for what purpose.

twin_state_paths.description: Filesystem paths where each state category is stored in the digital twin.

forge_manifest_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the forge manifest used to create this cell.
